parameters.query:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(a.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS fecha,
  TO_CHAR(a.scheduled_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota', 'HH12:MI AM')  AS hora,
  p.first_name || ' ' || p.last_name                                   AS paciente,
  p.email,
  p.phone                                                               AS telefono,
  a.appointment_type                                                    AS tipo,
  a.duration_minutes                                                    AS duracion_min,
  a.status                                                              AS estado,
  COALESCE(a.google_meet_link, '')                                      AS meet_link,
  COALESCE(a.google_calendar_event_id, '')                              AS calendar_id,
  COALESCE(a.session_notes, '')                                         AS notas,
  TO_CHAR(a.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH12:MI AM') AS creada_en
FROM appointments a
JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.id
WHERE a.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  AND a.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY a.scheduled_at ASC
